description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named unittest that runs on every pull request to the main branch. The workflow has two jobs: unit and cover. The unit job runs on an ubuntu-latest environment with a matrix strategy across multiple Python versions, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs nox, runs unit tests with nox, and uploads coverage results as artifacts. The cover job runs on ubuntu-latest, depends on the unit job, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.8, installs coverage, downloads coverage results, combines them, and reports coverage with a fail-under threshold of 100.
